oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Remote-workspace phase 2: forward the IPC socket + install shell integration remotely so a remote Claude pane gets live busy/idle, auto-title, and OSC-7 pwd tracking (deferred from PR #66).
Daily-drive the shipped app (now v1.5.6) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Stopped the app auto-installing repo-only skills (release, graphify, session-audit) into ~/.claude/skills: the Bundle Claude Skills build phase now bundles only the tian skill, and SkillInstaller skips symlinked destinations so a dev machine's ~/.claude/skills/tian → repo symlink survives version bumps. Leaked global copies removed by hand.

Released v1.5.7 (build 503) — fixed stuck busy/subagent/team indicators (PR #86). tian only learned about subagents from Claude's background_tasks snapshot (piped in on Stop/SubagentStop), which never mentions foreground subagents — and Stop doesn't fire on ESC, so a cancelled turn stayed pinned busy until a 180s TTL. Registered the three hooks tian never used (SubagentStart, TeammateIdle, PostToolUseFailure — all present in Claude Code 2.1.207) and added an explicit lifecycle refcount in PaneStatusManager alongside the snapshot feed: BackgroundActivity gains a Source (lifecycle/snapshot) + .teammate kind, syncActivities becomes a partial replace so a snapshot can't evict a live foreground subagent, dedupe-by-id kills the double-count, TTLs split 180s snapshot / 900s lifecycle, and SessionEnd gets a true clear-all. Teammates deliberately survive Stop/new-prompt (they outlive a turn); subagents don't. 1088/1089 tests (one pre-existing load-sensitive WorktreeOrchestrator flake), 11/11 new hook-shell tests; code review found 4 issues (incl. a SessionEnd clear regression), all fixed in-branch; security review clean. Notarized (Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live. Teammate payload field names (teammate_id/teammate_name) are still inferred from the Claude binary, not confirmed against a real agent-teams run — begin/end hooks log raw payloads to ~/Library/Logs/tian/claude-hooks.log for that check.

Fixed new normal-mode sessions launching in the terminal panel's wandered-to cwd. SessionCollection.resolveWorkingDirectory() now resolves to the workspace root (main worktree in a git repo) then $HOME, ignoring every pane's live OSC 7 cwd and the active session's own default — so a new session created while a worktree session is active still lands at the main repo root. Removed the sourcePaneDirectory() OSC-7 leak; terminal-panel splits still inherit their source pane's cwd via PaneViewModel. 43 resolver/session tests pass; Debug build clean.
